title: Exquisite elytra
description: Change your elytra by changing the name!
body:
# **There are 10 Elytra skins in this pack, I will update more in the future.**

- **Need optifine**

- **This texture pack was originally designed for the wing system in the map <Exorcism Legend> (unreleased) and is now released independently!**

![ALL Elytra](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a0252c350f21cf81812fb5251ce4d1d058adbdb_0.webp)

## Texture and name comparison table:

![comparison table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f65d73bac74a59a5cc0449fb8d4250bf7cc77686.png)
